entry.title: Starting a blog
entry.summary: A short note on why I am starting this, and what to expect.
entry.content:
This is a small corner of the internet where I plan to send things when they feel done.

I keep a lot of notes in Obsidian — half-formed ideas, drafts, reactions to papers I am reading. Most of them stay private, and that is fine. But some of them want to be finished. They want a destination, even a quiet one. This blog is that destination.

The bar is not “publishable” in the academic sense. The bar is “I am willing to put my name on it.” If a post helps me think a little more clearly, and if a stranger or a friend stumbles across it and finds it worth their time, that is enough.

Topics will likely cluster around things I already think about: logic, counterfactuals, the philosophy of science, occasional public-philosophy questions. There will probably also be detours into tools, workflows, and whatever I am reading.

If you want to follow along, there is an Atom feed.
